scripts.dev: concurrently --names "main,mybirth,what2watch,mymalaysia" -c "cyan,green,yellow,magenta" "vite" "npm --prefix src/data/subdomains/mybirth run dev" "npm --prefix src/data/subdomains/what2watch run dev" "npm --prefix src/data/subdomains/mymalaysia run dev"
scripts.generate:seo: npm run generate:sitemap && npm run generate:robots
scripts.build:main: npm run generate:seo && tsc -b && vite build && node scripts/prerender-meta.mjs && node scripts/prerender-snapshot.mjs
scripts.build:mymalaysia: npm --prefix src/data/subdomains/mymalaysia run build:static && node scripts/copy-mymalaysia-dist.mjs
scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run build:mybirth && npm run build:what2watch && npm run build:mymalaysia
